testcase.name: @BeforeClass launchBrowser
testcase.failure: org.openqa.selenium.remote.NoSuchDriverException: Unable to obtain: geckodriver, error Command failed with code: 65, executed: [--browser, firefox, --language-binding, java, --output, json] Error parsing JSON from URL https://product-details.mozilla.org/1.0/firefox_versions.json expected value at line 1 column 1 Build info: version: '4.38.0', revision: '6b412e825c*'
